name: Void-Skipper Long-Range Stealth Courier

electronics.sensor_notes: Medium Tactical Ultra-Scanner. Base ECM -6 from Ghost-Shell (default module). With co-pilot running Silent (Move 10/300), ECM increases to -10. Flight computer can be mind-linked: pilot with high Psychic ability gains +1 Handling (to +7) and Chase up to +23.

logistics.endurance: Void-Skipper Jump Drive with rapid-cycle capacitors

module_slots.notes: Accessory slot. Default: Ghost-Shell Stealth-Field Generator. Alternatives: Extra Fuel Cell, ELINT Sensor Suite. Swap in hangar, approx 1 hour.
Cargo/Utility slot. Default: Pneumatic Vehicle Rack (2 grav-bikes or 1 SM+2 rover). Alternatives: Passenger Coffins (4 pods), Expedition Pallet (2.5 tons cargo).
Engine slot. Default: ARC Gravitic Pulse (Move 35/950, Hnd +6, Chase +22). Alternative: Redjack Brute Overclock (Move 50/1100, Hnd +5, -4 High-G penalty, Chase +22).

description: The Void-Skipper looks like a jagged, obsidian needle. The tandem cockpit sits forward like a dragonfly's head, with the rest of the ship consisting of the massive Jump Drive and the modular belly rack. Designed as a prototype by ARC with custom Redjack overhaul, it is classified as a Long-Range Stealth Courier and Prototype Infiltrator. The cockpit houses a Pilot and a Systems Op/Co-Pilot in a cramped, lean-back configuration. No pressurized interior; pilots must wear vacc suits. At $45M it is nearly 14 times the cost of a Drifter, reflecting its prototype status and the unique Rating 4 drive.
